Ser [Lancel](wiki:Lancel_Lannister) curses [Cersei](wiki:Cersei_Lannister) for calling [her son](wiki:Joffrey_Baratheon) back inside [the Holdfast](wiki:Red_Keep), when the king’s presence might have...
[Dontos](wiki:Dontos_Hollard) persuades her to lock herself in her room, and when Sansa arrives at her chambers, she finds [Sandor Clegane](wiki:Sandor_Clegane) hiding in the shadows. The Hound,...
